items.title: Enhance Scheduled Tasks with Editable Title Field in Nexior ✏️
items.summary: This update reintroduces an editable task title field in the Scheduled Tasks dialog, allowing users to customize their task names. The new input field is integrated above the prompt input, ensuring a seamless user experience. Existing functionality remains intact, as empty titles will revert to auto-generated names, maintaining backward compatibility.

items.title: Streamline Access Token Management in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a durable, non-expiring platform token for the AceDataCloud connector, eliminating the need for users to re-authorize after each deployment. Key changes include the removal of the refresh token mechanism and the implementation of a new token minting process that ensures seamless access across pod restarts. Comprehensive tests have been added to validate the new functionality and ensure stability.

items.title: Enhance Platform Tokens with Tags and Metadata in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces `tags` and `metadata` fields to the `PlatformToken` model, allowing for better management of tokens. A new `?tag=` filter has been added to the list endpoint, enabling users to retrieve tokens based on specific tags. These changes aim to improve token reuse and reduce the need for re-authorization, enhancing the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance Multi-Word Search Functionality in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a fan-out search feature for the public documentation search, allowing multi-word queries to return relevant results. The implementation includes a new `tokenize_query()` function to split queries into keywords and a `relevance_score()` function to rank results based on keyword matches. Unit tests have been added to ensure the reliability of the new functionality.

items.title: Update FontAwesome Icons to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/free-brands-svg-icons package from version 7.2.0 to 7.3.0. Key changes include improvements and new icons as detailed in the release notes. This ensures our project benefits from the latest features and fixes.
